loginDesc: Identify yourself to access the dashboard.
regDesc: Fill in your details to start.

title: Suspicious Transaction Detection
landDesc: The ultimate Big Data analysis platform. Identify financial anomalies in seconds, protect your assets, and ensure the integrity of your operations.
loginSysDesc:
Intelligent Suspicious Transaction Detection platform.

Protect your assets and ensure financial integrity with our advanced anomaly analysis.
logoutMsg: Are you sure you want to log out?
hintUpload: Tip: the default column is value (you can change it under “Column”).
hintBatch: Tip: Enable to avoid crashes when analyzing large spreadsheets.
chartSubtitle: Red dots highlight values considered suspicious.
modalMsg2:
suspicious transactions.

Would you like to view the trend chart now?
errMissingCol: The spreadsheet must have a column named '{col}'.
errFewData: Not enough data in column '{col}' to calculate statistics.
errFewDataStd: Not enough data to calculate standard deviation.
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this database?
tourSkip: Do you want to skip the tutorial?
tourS1Desc: Your new intelligence center for detecting financial anomalies. Let's take a quick tour.
tourS2Desc: Upload your spreadsheets (CSV, Excel) here. The system will automatically load the transaction database.
tourS3Desc: Choose the mathematical method (Sigma, Z-Score) and adjust the AI sensitivity to find suspicious transactions.
tourS4Desc: Your database will appear in this table. Just click 'Analyze' to generate charts and identify fraud.
tourS5Desc: Once the analysis is complete, buttons to download the Table (CSV) and Chart (PNG) will appear here.
tourS6Desc: Need high contrast, colorblind mode, or a screen reader? The options are right here.
tourS7Desc: You might already know this, but here you can change the system language at any time.
tourS8Desc: Prefer working in the dark? Toggle between Light and Dark themes right here.
tourS9Desc: Finally, here you can view your details and log out. Enjoy the system!
errNoDob: Please enter your date of birth.
errUnder18: Access denied: You must be 18 years or older to use the financial analysis system.
regLgpdText: I have read and agree to the
errLgpd: You must accept the Privacy Terms to create an account.
termsContent:
PRIVACY AND DATA PROCESSING TERMS

1. Data Collection: We collect only the information strictly necessary for account creation.
2. Purpose: Your data will be used exclusively for authentication, access control, and age validation in the DataGuard system.
3. File Processing: Financial data and spreadsheets sent for analysis are processed in memory and/or temporarily stored confidentially, and are not used for other purposes.
4. Your Rights: In accordance with data protection laws, you may request the deletion of your account and all your data at any time.

* This is an academic project for non-commercial purposes.
